name: Nutcracker Sweets
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups Powdered sugar, plus additional for dusting
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan with butter flavored shortening.
In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and peanut butter using an electric mixer on medium speed. Gradually add in the brown sugar until well combined.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing until creamy.
In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate measuring cup, mix together the milk and vanilla extract.
Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk into the creamed mixture. Mix on low speed, scraping the bowl frequently, until fully blended.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until set.
Allow cookies to cool completely.
For frosting, cream the shortening and peanut butter in a large bowl on medium speed. Gradually add the powdered sugar and milk, beating until fluffy.
Spread the frosting over the cooled cookies.
To make the drizzle, melt the chocolate chips in a small saucepan over low heat. Once melted, use a spoon to drizzle the chocolate back and forth over the frosting.
Cut into squares. Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes or until the chocolate is firm.
